deviations.description: The new requirement introduces an obligation that consent must be obtained from the data subject before retrieving any personal data. The process model on page 1 shows that the phone company requests personal data from the customer before asking for consent, as the 'Request personal data' activity occurs prior to 'Ask for consent.' This directly violates the new obligation that 'ask_consent_from_data_subject' must precede 'retrieve_personal_data_from_data_subject.'
